How It Works

Moving Made Simple

From quote to new home — four easy steps.

📋
1
Get Your Quote

Flat-fee price in minutes online or by phone. No commitment.

👤
2
Meet Coordinator

A personal coordinator plans every detail of your move.

📱
3
Track Live on App

Real-time GPS — like Uber for your move. Know everything.

🏡
4
Enjoy New Home

Delivered, assembled, placed. We don't leave until you're happy.

01
Instant Online Quote

Our smart calculator gives you a guaranteed flat-fee price based on cu.ft., floor access, distance and services. No waiting — though we're always happy to talk.

02
Dedicated Coordinator

Within 30 minutes of booking, your Move Coordinator calls to confirm every detail — building access, COI, timing. They stay with you through the whole move.

03
Real-Time GPS

On move day you get a live tracking link. Watch your crew approach in real time, get ETAs by text, and stay informed every step — just like Uber.

04
Quality Control

A QC supervisor may arrive on your move day to ensure perfection. We follow up the next day. No move is closed until you're 100% satisfied.
